content_body:
Discover Blue Ridge GA’s best-kept secret... Serenity in the Mountains. Serenity is a full-service spa located in the heart of Blue Ridge, Georgia. Their clients come from around the country. Whether you are looking for a hot stone facial, a relaxing massage, a pedicure, or just a manicure… you’ve found what you are looking for. Plan a perfect spa day with bridesmaids, girls' weekend, or couples massage. Serenity in the Mountains will help you create the perfect memory.

Enjoy a refreshing drink by a cozy fire while you wait for your next spa service. Our relaxation area is warm and cozy. It’s a great place to wait between all your services.

  • Day Spa
  • Manicures
  • Pedicures
  • Facials
  • Massage
title: Serenity in the Mountains
